name: DealStream

pricing_tiers.notes: SSO, audit log, full feature set included
AI forecasting, advanced territory management, dedicated CSM

features: AI-powered deal scoring and next-step recommendations
unlimited email sequences with send-time optimisation
Outlook and Gmail native bidirectional sync
customisable pipeline stages with drag-and-drop automation
mobile app (iOS and Android, full feature parity)
built-in meeting scheduler with calendar sync
real-time activity feed and deal timeline
pipeline health dashboard with win-rate analytics
known_limitations: No native LinkedIn enrichment — requires third-party integration (Lusha, Clearbit) at additional cost
UK data residency not available — EU (Frankfurt) only
Migration from NexusCRM estimated at 8 working hours using built-in migration tool
notes: At 22 seats, Growth tier = £462/mo vs NexusCRM £510/mo = £48/mo saving (£576/yr). Migration at 8hrs × £48 = £384 one-time, amortised £128/yr. Net = £448/yr. Direct saving below threshold — operational gains needed. Resolves: email sequence limit, mobile instability, Outlook sync, API rate limits (InsightDeck sync issue). LinkedIn enrichment gap remains but can be addressed with Lusha. Strong operational case for SWITCH at NexusCRM contract renewal (Aug 2025).
